/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -shared  -o _ffroom_core.cpython-313-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/_ffroom_core.dir/src/core/Grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_ffroom_core.dir/src/core/PoissonSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_ffroom_core.dir/src/core/BoundaryManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_ffroom_core.dir/src/core/FluidSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_ffroom_core.dir/src/bindings/module.cpp.o
